case_title: EBHODAGHE ESOIMEME VS. STANLEY BRANDES PRICE JR et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESOIMEME, EBHODAGHE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRICE JR, STANLEY BRANDES PAICH, JASON DBA THUX VALET COMPANY THUX, JEFFREY ARRUDA $2,725.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,725.00, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 80$% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT PRICE, AND 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANTS PAICH AND THUX. DEFENDANT SANTOS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A PARTY. THE DAMAGES ARE BASED ON THE TOTAL LOSS OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO VACATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF HEARING

PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO VACATE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY EBHODAGHE ESOIMEME IS GRANTED. REQUEST TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE ACKNOWLEDEMENT OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT ENTERS ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, BASED ON DEFENDANT'S PARTIAL PAYMENT OF $2180.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. MONICA HA, INSURANCE REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT STANKEY B. PRICE APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
